falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'hold' signal and historical bottom pattern, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would suggest extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the current phase and falsifying the UNKNOWN call.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume exceeds the 6-month average daily volume by 200% while the price makes a new 6-month high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination of extreme volume and price breakout would indicate a confirmed bullish reversal, invalidating the hold signal and historical pattern match.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
